name: Open Collective
description: Open Collective — Transparent funding platform for open-source projects and communities with public finances.

seo.title: Open Collective — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Open Collective: Open Collective — Transparent funding platform for open-source projects and communities with public finances.

when_to_use: Transparent funding collection for an open-source project
Public expense reporting and budgeting for a community org
Recurring donation management for a developer community
Fiscal hosting for a community group without a legal entity

pros: Fiscal hosts handle legal and tax wrapper
cons: Fees stack across host and platform
Not ideal for private or commercial orgs
review.verdict: The default for transparent OSS funding, but governance uncertainty is a real watch item.
review.best_for: Open-source collectives needing a transparent, fiscally hosted funding structure.
review.not_for: Private commercial projects or teams wanting a clean SaaS payments experience.
